stem: The graph of y = f(x) in the xy-plane passes through the points (0, 1) and (2, 5). The graph is translated up 3 units to form the graph of y = g(x). Which of the following points lies on the graph of y = g(x)?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. Translating a graph up 3 units adds 3 to the y-coordinate of every point. The point (0, 1) on f maps to (0, 1 + 3) = (0, 4) on g.

Choice A is unchanged from f. Choice C shifts horizontally rather than vertically. Choice D subtracts 3 instead of adding.
